title: AI Engineer
company_focus:
Product engineering firm providing full-cycle product
development using AI, ML, and data analytics
description:
About BayRock Labs At BayRock Labs, we pioneer innovative
tech solutions that drive business transformation. As a
leading product engineering firm based in Silicon Valley, we
provide full-cycle product development, leveraging cutting-
edge technologies in AI, ML, and data analytics. Our
collaborative, inclusive culture fosters professional growth
and work-life balance. Join us to work on ground-breaking
projects and be part of a team that values excellence,
integrity, and innovation. Together, let's redefine what's
possible in technology.

AI Engineers with strong hands-on experience building and
integrating LLM-powered systems. The ideal profiles includes
deep Python skills and production-grade experience with
agent frameworks and modern API development. Key
Requirements

- AI & LLM Integration (prompting, orchestration, model
  evaluation, pipeline design)
- Python (production-level backend + data/ML workflows)
- LangGraph & LangChain (agent workflows, tools, memory,
  graph-based orchestration)
- FastAPI (robust backend services, API gateways, async
  execution)
responsibilities: Design and implement AI/LLM pipelines and orchestration workflows
Develop agent workflows using LangGraph and LangChain
Implement prompting strategies and model evaluation processes
Build production-grade backend services and API gateways using FastAPI
Create graph-based orchestration with tools and memory for AI agents
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and integrating LLM-
powered systems, including working with agent frameworks
(LangGraph, LangChain), prompting, orchestration, and model
evaluation. The engineer will be hands-on with LLM
technologies, not just supporting infrastructure for AI
work.
